feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Arisen The Bat
entry.summary:
Author: dexpair

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,526Chapters: 14/71Kudos: 14

Summary: On the streets of a Neo Gotham, old man Bruce Wayne lived his life as quite as possible. No more hero stuff, no more meetings with The League in space. His days were filled with silly conversations with his husband or listening to the dramas of his teenage son. It was an opposite reality to the one he had lived his whole life, but that's what made it special for him. However, on a special day, Bruce discovers that getting rid of his past life wouldn't be so easy. Ghosts from the past have returned, this time haunting his children, and The Dark Knight realizes he will have to act for his city and his family one last time.

  • Major Character Death

entry.title: I Want to Know You
entry.summary:
Author: dueefbigfard

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,792Chapters: 3/6Kudos: 80

Summary: Clark heard the static of Nightwing’s earpiece crackle to life as Oracle started talking. “There’s an attempted breaking and entering, half a mile south of you. Can you—” “On it.” Dick sprang to his feet and rolled his shoulders back, and suddenly Nightwing wasn’t just a story Clark had shared with a little boy all those years ago. “That’s my cue. See you around, Supes.” “Of course. Real quick, though,” Clark added, a little desperate. “If he’s not like…that, then what is Bruce actually like when he’s drunk?” “My friend,” Dick said, holding Clark by the shoulders in mock seriousness. “Perhaps one day you will know—but today is not that day.” “Right, of course, sure.” Bats and their secrets. “Be careful out there, buddy.” “Always am,” Dick said, lying through his teeth as he dropped ever so casually from the building.   5 times Clark thought Bruce was drunk, and one time he actually was

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne

entry.title: An Emerald's Gaze
entry.summary:
Author: Kyronie

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,167Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 108

Summary: "Guys are we sure this is the correct place?' Clint asked pushing his way through rock and rubble. "Guys!" Natasha called out standing over an unknown substance on the ground. When the Avengers answered the alarm about a surge in magical energy in Queens, they were expecting finding Loki or another sorcerer. Finding a freshly resurrected Spider-Man sitting in a green fluorescent puddle was not on that list. OR Peter Parker is revived using the Lazarus Pits and the Avengers have to figure out how their youngest member has returned from the dead. Also why he now looks like a green eyed skunk. Bruce Wayne wants to know why his family's tragedy was done again.

entry.title: sunflower state
entry.summary:
Author: floatingflowers

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,703Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 79

Summary: “What you thinking so hard about?” Clark asked, his large hand coming to rest lightly on Bruce’s thigh. Bruce blinked out of his reverie, turning to look at Clark’s profile as the man focused on the road. His curls fluttered around in the breeze of the AC, and his eyes sparkled with energy from the sun. Clark’s red flannel shirt that Bruce pretended to hate was rolled up to his elbows, unintentionally showing off his powerful forearms. To Bruce, he was the most gorgeous man in the world. “You.” Bruce replied, uncharacteristically sentimental. He was rewarded with Clark’s small, shy smile, and traces of red colouring his cheeks, tracing up to the tips of his ears. Clark didn’t respond, and Bruce took some satisfaction in his ability to render Clark speechless, but he felt Clark’s love all the same, the other man gently squeezing his thigh. “Get a room!” Dick gagged from the back, wriggling around with his seatbelt. Bruce hit his head back against the headrest once more. It would be a long twenty minutes to Smallville. Or: Clark takes Bruce and Dick to Smallville to meet his parents

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.summary:
Author: Nightwing_is_the_best

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,292Chapters: 9/26Kudos: 69

Summary: basically peter goes to Gotham trope that is definitely overused but I am righting what I want to read because I'm fed up of not finding what I want when this is eventually finished let me know what to wright about because i will go and watch it learn the fandom and create if i can concentrate long enough lol.peter wakes up as his baby self however dr strange comes in a dream and seals his memories to make it easier on him but sometimes peter gets consciousness and can have fun he has powers from the beginning but they don't show up on meta scans and peter has white hair due to the power of the infinity stones in him that have increased his power.

entry.title: I Used To Obsess Over Living, Now I Only Obsess Over You
entry.summary:
Author: l0s3rzclub

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,278Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 63

Summary: Clark, of course, knew that Bruce Wayne had been studying at Metropolis University. The billionaire was all anyone could talk about when he first got accepted. Except for Clark. He'd actually counted himself lucky to never run into the guy. From the sounds of it, Bruce was just another rich kid with a superiority complex. ______ OR: Enemies to Lovers College AU because it's so fucking good.

entry.summary:
Author: no_stranger

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,107Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 68

entry.title: Hand Over Hand
entry.summary:
Author: clownandout

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,813Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 210

Summary: The plan had failed. Harley had the virus. The hideout was wrecked. The blood was gone. John was in the office. And the solution was nowhere to be found. But, not for the first time, and certainly not the last, John isn't something he can ignore. ---- It should never have been like this. John Doe never becomes the Joker. Batman is preoccupied with keeping an eye on one of the few people he has left. A new mystery is unfolding in Metropolis. Three men clash and come together. And when cosmic cracks start to show, no one is prepared to go face to face with a stranger that's challenged them hundreds of times before.

entry.title: The Fifth Letter
entry.summary:
Author: ObsidianWings_Ink

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,331Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 7

Summary: ​In a universe where the gifted attend the prestigious Academy of Superheroes, fifteen-year-old Bruce Wayne is just a powerless orphan from the bleak streets of Gotham. He has sent five letters, pleading for a single chance. He expected another rejection; he didn't expect a confrontation with Roman Sionis to unlock something mysterious in a dark alleyway. ​New romances, new friendships, and new adventures await him—along with a tragic event that lies ahead. ​(More tags will be added as the story progresses.)

entry.title: From Gotham with Love
entry.summary:
Author: anxiousdepressedintrovert

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 70,164Chapters: 21/?Kudos: 120

Summary: Martha and Thomas Wayne are Gotham’s golden couple—wealthy, admired, and untouchable. Their daughter, Beatrice, is the heart of their legacy. But one night shatters everything. The Waynes are murdered in cold blood, and young Beatrice vanishes without a trace. Two years later, she returns. Alive—but not the same. Now, Gotham must face the mystery of the girl who came back... and the shadows that followed her home.

entry.summary:
Author: inkinverse

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,932Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 34

entry.title: An Unhealthy Obssession
entry.summary:
Author: Su1c1d4l_4l3x4nd3r

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,936Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 261

Summary: "All that we see or seem is but a dream within a dream.” You move back to Gotham after failing to make it in Metropolis and accidentally stumble onto a murder scene laced with Scarecrow’s fear gas. Shaken and paranoid from the exposure, you run right into Red Robin on patrol. Instead of being seen as a victim, your behavior makes you look guilty. Tim’s instincts kick in, and he convinces himself you’re hiding something. From there, he starts watching, digging, and following — obsessed with proving a guilt that isn’t really there. or Tim Drake being a fucking creep, like he is programmed to be. Tim Drake x Male reader.

entry.title: A Touch of Blue
entry.summary:
Author: Fyoex

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,568Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 15

Summary: To prepare for a scenario where Superboy loses his powers mid-battle, Nightwing volunteers to help train them using Blue Kryptonite. But concern mounts when Jon has an abnormally strong reaction to it. And when he’s later kept in the dark about the young Kent’s condition, Dick Grayson finds himself becoming a tad unhinged. – Even before his Kryptonian heritage officially set in, Jonathan Kent had never once gotten sick, not even with the common cold. So he didn’t quite understand the implications behind a simple bruise. It’s alright, though. For the people he loves the most, he will persevere.

entry.title: Dead Reckoning Part Two
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 186,720Chapters: 11/12Kudos: 11

Summary: Aven is living on borrowed time, his body harboring something intelligent, dangerous, and very much awake. As powerful corporations circle and a desperate mission pushes him deep into enemy territory, survival demands disguises, secrets, and impossible trust. Love offers brief sanctuary, even as it makes everything more fragile. Hunted, exposed, and running out of room to run, Aven must face the truth:staying alive may cost more than dying ever would...

entry.title: A Little Sunshine
entry.summary:
Author: LuminescentWoollyBear

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,933Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 41

Summary: An alien appears in Metropolis and Bruce doesn't know what to do about it. Even more concerning, Bruce breaks his promise to himself to avoid unnecessary attachments and starts developing feelings for his new friend, Clark. But he just can't help gravitating towards the earnest kindness and protective warmth of the other. If he isn't careful, Bruce might even start trusting him. ~~~ None of them are prominent, but this fic does include some non-superbat ships to various degrees, including: Bruce/Other, Bruce/Selina Kyle
